channel.title: AuraBase AI Council Blogs | Wellness Experiments & Recovery Science
channel.description: Insights on personal wellness experiments, sleep recovery, AI nutrition and fitness coaching, biomechanics, mindfulness, and biohacking — from AuraBase's AI Council.

item.title: From Mind, Body & Spirit to The Lab: Why We Rebuilt AuraBase Around Your Data
item.description: A founder's note on pivoting away from gamified holistic wellness toward personal experiments, cross-domain signal mapping, and a serious data-driven loop — Train, Fuel, Recover.

item.title: What Research Says About AI Meal Photos for Calories & Macros — and Where AuraBase Stands
item.description: Aria surveys 2021–2026 studies on vision-only meal scanning accuracy, compares hybrid USDA + Canadian Nutrient File grounding, and explains AuraBase's honest accuracy position.

item.title: Why Your Meal Photo Needs a Database: Inside AuraBase's Hybrid AI Meal Scanner V2
item.description: Aria cites 2024–2026 research on GPS, timestamps, and EXIF metadata improving meal-scan accuracy, plus AuraBase V2's hybrid LLM + USDA/Canadian Nutrient File architecture.

item.title: Introducing Our YouTube Music Page: An Extension of the Sound Sanctuary
item.description: Launching our YouTube Music Artist Page — a digital sanctuary for meditation, yoga, deep focus, and healing. New spiritual meditation tracks released monthly.

item.title: Matter Over Mind: The Biological Impact of Mindfulness Meditation
item.description: How mindfulness meditation rewires neural pathways associated with anxiety. Clinical protocols from Zenith, your AI Mindfulness Guide at AuraBase.

item.title: The AI Nutritionist: Designing Your Optimal Healthy Eating Plan
item.description: Stop crash dieting. Learn how Aria, your Global AI Nutritionist, architects personalized healthy eating plans from global cuisine.

item.title: The Data-Driven Yogi: Merging Ancient Flow with Modern Wearables
item.description: How Atlas merges yoga, wearable fitness trackers, and AI coaching to turn every session into actionable biometric data.

item.title: AuraBase is Officially Live on the Apple App Store
item.description: AuraBase is now available on the Apple App Store. Download the iOS app and start your holistic wellness evolution today.

item.title: Six months in—and we are live on Google Play
item.description: AuraBase is live on Google Play. A founder's note on the journey, the community that made it possible, and what comes next.

item.title: Beyond the Mirror: How MediaPipe is Forcing Perfect Form
item.description: Atlas uses Google MediaPipe BlazePose to track 33 body landmarks in real time and correct your form before injury occurs.

item.title: Beyond "Chicken and Rice": Reclaiming Macros Through Global Cuisine
item.description: Aria's Cultural Nuance Engine builds macro-perfect meal plans from South Asian, Mediterranean, East Asian, and Latin American cuisines.

item.title: Hacking Your Circadian Rhythm: What Your Wearable Isn't Telling You
item.description: Luna transforms raw wearable sleep data into personalized Sleep Optimization Protocols and hormetic stress cycles.

item.title: The Physical ROI of Mental Stillness: Rewiring Brain and Body
item.description: Daily mindfulness meditation lowers cortisol, improves HRV, and accelerates physical recovery. The science from Zenith.

item.title: Sounds that Shape Your Mind: The Science of Binaural Beats
item.description: Solace explains how binaural beats trigger brainwave entrainment for deep focus, relaxation, and restorative sleep.
